**What changed** — and why, if it is not obvious from the diff.

**How you verified it** — what you ran, clicked or pressed to watch it work. CI runs `./build.sh` and
`./test.sh`; say what it cannot check.

- [ ] Panel, popover or window material touched? Then `DESIGN.md` was read first — the glass breaks
      in ways that fail silently.
- [ ] Code, comments and docs in English.
